subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! The epistle which serveth as a deterrent to the people of hypocrisy, dispelleth discord, summoneth all to unity, and verily breaketh asunder [the forces of dissension] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق رساله ایکه رادع اهل نفاق و دافع شقاق و داعی وفاق بود بلکه قاصم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
